title: Silly String Spray Party Streamers – Mixed Colours Fun Spray Cans for Kids Birthday, Weddings, Festivals,Christmas Celebrations & Pranks - Pack of 6
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: 6 Vibrant Spray Cans – Includes 6 assorted colourful silly string cans to liven up any party or event.
Perfect for All Occasions – Ideal for birthdays, weddings, New Year’s, festivals, school parties, and holiday fun.
Safe & Easy for Kids – Simple to use and non-toxic, making it safe for kids (recommended under adult supervision).
Bright & Colourful Fun – Produces colourful string that adds visual excitement and playful chaos to any event.
Mess-Free Clean Up – Designed to be non-sticky and easy to clean off surfaces, fabrics, and hair.
